stages.concept:
# Unit 143: 분사구문 (때, 이유) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 분사구문의 **때**와 **이유** 의미에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **때 (= when, while, as)** — ~할 때, ~하는 동안

> **Walking** along the street, I met my friend.
> 거리를 걷고 있을 때, 나는 친구를 만났다.
> = **While** I was **walking** along the street, ...

> **Arriving** at the station, I called her.
> 역에 도착했을 때, 나는 그녀에게 전화했다.
> = **When** I **arrived** at the station, ...

👩‍🏫 선생님: **이유 (= because, since, as)** — ~이므로, ~때문에

> **Being** sick, she stayed home.
> 아프기 때문에 그녀는 집에 있었다.
> = **Because** she **was** sick, ...

> **Having** no money, I couldn't buy it.
> 돈이 없어서 나는 그것을 살 수 없었다.
> = **Since** I **had** no money, ...

> **Not knowing** the answer, I kept silent.
> 답을 몰라서 나는 조용히 있었다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 분사구문이 나타내는 의미로 가장 알맞은 것을 고르세요.**
"<u>Feeling hungry</u>, he went to a restaurant."
1. 양보 (배가 고팠지만)
2. 이유 (배가 고팠기 때문에) ✅
3. 조건 (배가 고프다면)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요.
문맥을 보면 앞의 '배가 고픔(Feeling hungry)'이 뒤의 '식당에 갔다(went to a restaurant)'의 **이유**가 되므로, '배가 고팠기 때문에(Because he felt hungry)'라는 의미를 갖는 분사구문이에요.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 분사구문은 문맥으로 '때'인지 '이유'인지 판단하면 되는 거군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 143: 분사구문 때, 이유 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 분사구문에서 생략된 접속사를 고르시오.
Going on a picnic, we have to bring a mat. (     )
> **정답** When (If)

---

**02.** Being busy, she couldn't come. ?
> **정답** Because (As/Since)

---

**03.** Arriving at the station, I called my mom. ?
> **정답** When (After)

---

**04.** Not having a car, he took the bus. ?
> **정답** Because (As/Since)

---

**05.** Walking home, I saw a rainbow. ?
> **정답** While (When)

---

**06.** 접속사절을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
When I arrived at school, the bell rang.
> **정답** Arriving at school, the bell rang.

---

**07.** Because he was tired, he fell asleep.
> **정답** Being tired, he fell asleep.

---

**08.** When she saw the dog, she screamed.
> **정답** Seeing the dog, she screamed.

---

**09.** Because I didn't eat breakfast, I was hungry.
> **정답** Not eating breakfast, I was hungry.

---

**10.** When he heard the news, he was shocked.
> **정답** Hearing the news, he was shocked.

---

**11.** 분사구문을 접속사절로 바꾸시오. (때)
Walking to school, I met my teacher.
> **정답** While I was walking to school, I met my teacher.

---

**12.** Arriving at home, I took a shower.
> **정답** When I arrived at home, I took a shower.

---

**13.** 분사구문을 접속사절로 바꾸시오. (이유)
Being sick, she went to the hospital.
> **정답** Because she was sick, she went to the hospital.

---

**14.** Not having an umbrella, he got wet.
> **정답** Because he didn't have an umbrella, he got wet.

---

**15.** Having no money, I couldn't buy the book.
> **정답** Because I had no money, I couldn't buy the book.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
학교에 도착해서 친구를 만났다. (때)
Arriving school at I met my friend
> **정답** Arriving / at / school / I / met / my / friend

---

**17.** 아파서 병원에 갔다. (이유)
Being he sick went to the hospital
> **정답** Being / sick / he / went / to / the / hospital

---

**18.** 소식을 듣고 기뻐했다. (때)
Hearing the news was she happy
> **정답** Hearing / the / news / she / was / happy

---

**19.** 돈이 없어서 택시를 못 탔다. (이유)
Not money having he took the bus
> **정답** Not / having / money / he / took / the / bus

---

**20.** 집에 오자 숙제를 했다. (때)
Arriving home at I did my homework
> **정답** Arriving / at / home / I / did / my / homework
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 143: 분사구문 때, 이유 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을
고르시오. [2개]
Liking her, I will give her a present.
Because I like her
Though I like her
Since I like her
After I like her
> **정답** Because I like her, Since I like her

---

**02.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을
고르시오.
Coming into the office, he found his client waiting for
him.
Since he came into the office,
Because he came into the office,
When he came into the office,
If he came into the office,
• client 고객
> **정답** When he came into the office,

---

**03.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
He called me, knowing my phone number.
He called me, __________ he knew my phone
number.
since
while
if
though
> **정답** since

---

**04.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
Taking a walk, I listen to music.
________ I took a walk, I listened to music.
Since
Because
When
If
> **정답** When

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Being hungry, David couldn't pay attention to his
studies.
Before he was hungry
Although he was hungry
If he was hungry
Because he was hungry
> **정답** Because he was hungry

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
She saw a doctor, feeling a stomachache.
because she felt a stomachache
if she felt a stomachache
but she felt a stomachache
although she felt a stomachache
> **정답** because she felt a stomachache

---

**07.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 다른 것을 고르시오.
Being very sick, I couldn't go on the field trip.
Looking up at the sky I saw a bird fly over it.
Not having made a reservation, I had to wait
for my turn.
I don't go out at night, being afraid of the
dark.
Being tired, I went to bed early.
> **정답** Looking up at the sky I saw a bird fly over it.

---

**08.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
As soon as he heard loud noise, Henry screamed.
Heard the loud noise, Henry screamed.
Hearing the loud noise, Henry screamed.
To hear the loud noise, Henry screamed.
He heard the loud noise, Henry screamed.
> **정답** Hearing the loud noise, Henry screamed.

---

**09.** 주어진 분사구문을 부사절로 바꿀 때 어법상 틀린 곳을
찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
Sleeping in a movie theater, he couldn't
remember the story.
→ Because he sleeps in a movie
theater, he couldn't remember the story.
> **정답** Because, he, slept

---

**10.** 주어진 문장을 분사구문으로 바꿀 때 어법상 틀린 곳을
찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
When I arrived at the library, I noticed that I had
left my textbook.
→ I arriving at the library, I
noticed that I had left my textbook.
> **정답** Arriving, I, noticed

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분의 분사 구문과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오
Arriving at the restaurant, he ordered steak.
Taking a subway, you arrived on time.
Studying hard, she entered the university she
wanted.
Seeing her at the station, I hugged her.
Hardly knowing English, he couldn't talk to
the American.
> **정답** Seeing her at the station, I hugged her.

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분의 분사 구문과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오
Being too young, she can't go there alone.
Waiting for the bus, he was reading a book.
Picking up the plate, I found a note under it.
Meeting Hana at the cafe, I went back home.
Not wanting to play computer games, I
refused his offer.
> **정답** Not wanting to play computer games, I refused his offer.

---

**13.** 다음 두 분사구문이 공통으로 의미하는 접속사를
고르시오.
Arriving at the train station, he met her friends.
Leaving home, he took his car key.
Because
If
When
Although
> **정답** When

---

**14.** 다음 두 분사구문이 공통으로 의미하는 접속사를
고르시오.
Being wise, he must solve the problem.
Being impressed by the painting, I bought it.
As soon as
After
Before
Because
> **정답** Because

---

**15.** 다음 두 분사구문이 공통으로 의미하는 접속사를
고르시오.
Waking up in the morning, I drank cold water.
Finishing his speech, he took a bow.
If
After
Before
Though
> **정답** After

---

**16.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을
고르시오.
Entering the concert hall, he turned off his cell phone.
When he entered the concert hall.
Although he enter the concert hall.
If he entered the concert hall.
And he entered the concert hall.
> **정답** When he entered the concert hall.

---

**17.** 다음 중 분사구문이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Turning to the right, you will find the hospital.
Wearing shorts, he felt cold.
Being hungry, he ate my sandwich.
He crossing the street, the boy raised his
hand.
> **정답** He crossing the street, the boy raised his hand.

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오. [2개]
해변을 걸을 때, 나는 갈매기들이 나는 것을 보았다.
__________________ on the beach, I saw seagulls
flying.
As I walked
Because I was walking
Walking
Since I was walking
> **정답** As I walked, Walking

---

**19.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
고르시오. [2개]
나는 배가 고팠기 때문에 저녁을 준비하기 시작했다.
_________________________, I started preparing
dinner.
If I was hungry
Because I was hungry
When I was hungry
Being hungry
> **정답** Because I was hungry, Being hungry

---

**20.** 아래 글에서 어법상 틀린 것을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
Living in a remote island, I rarely went
to the city. Go to the city, I took the boat. In
the island, I raised sheep and cattle and
milked them.
> **정답** Living, went, Going, raised, milked
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 143 분사구문 때, 이유중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
When she opened the bag, she found the letter.
  (     )   (     ) , she found the letter.
정답 Opening, the, bag

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
As I got on the ship, I was excited.
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , I was excited.
정답 Getting, on, the, ship

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
Because she didn't like the cold, she wore a scarf
and gloves
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , she wore a scarf and
gloves.
정답 Not (Never), liking, the, cold

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
Because they weren't there, they didn't know the
accident.
  (     )   (     ) , they didn't know the
accident.
정답 Not (Never), being, there

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 분사구문으로 바꾸시오.
When I sleep at night, I hug my doll.
  (     )   (     ) , I hug my doll.
정답 Sleeping, at, night

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 바르게 배열하시오. (필요시
형태를 변형할 것)
우리는 강아지를 키우고 싶었기 때문에 넓은 마당이 있는
집을 샀다.
힌트 (     ) a dog, want, have, to
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , we bought a
house with a large yard.
정답 Wanting, to, have, a, dog

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 바르게 배열하시오. (필요시
형태를 변형할 것)
그는 좋은 성적을 받고 싶었기 때문에 열심히 연습했다.
[good, want, to, grades, get].
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , he studied
hard.
정답 Wanting, to, get, good, grades

---

**08.** 문장의 뜻이 같도록 분사구문을 부사절로 고치시오.
Having the same hobby, they became close.
Because  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , they
became close.
정답 they, had, the, same, hobby

---

**09.** 문장의 뜻이 같도록 분사구문을 부사절로 고치시오.
Coming home, he washed his hands.
When  (     )   (     )   (     ) , he washed his hands.
정답 he, came, home

---

**10.** 문장의 뜻이 같도록 분사구문을 부사절로 고치시오.
Looking at the beautiful pictures, I gradually
relaxed and felt much better.
When  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) ,
I relaxed and felt much better.
정답 I, looked, at, the, beautiful, pictures

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 143: 분사구문 때, 이유 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오. [2개]
Admiring her, I will give her a gift.
Because I admire her Though I admire her Since I admire her After I admire her
> 정답: Because I like her, Since I like her

---

**02.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Entering the classroom, she found her friend waiting for her.
Since she entered the classroom, Because she entered the classroom, When she entered the classroom, If she entered the classroom,
> 정답: When he came into the office,

---

**03.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
She texted me, knowing my number.
She texted me, __________ she knew my number. since while if though
> 정답: since

---

**04.** 다음 주어진 문장을 부사절로 바꿀 때, 빈칸에 가장 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
Taking a walk, I listen to podcasts. ________ I took a walk, I listened to podcasts.
Since Because When If
> 정답: When

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Being thirsty, Amy couldn't focus on her studies.
Before she was thirsty Although she was thirsty If she was thirsty Because she was thirsty
> 정답: Because he was hungry

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
He saw a dentist, feeling a toothache.
because he felt a toothache if he felt a toothache but he felt a toothache although he felt a toothache
> 정답: because he felt a toothache

---

**07.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 다른 것을 고르시오.
Being very tired, I couldn't finish the homework.
Looking out the window, I saw a rainbow appear.
Not having brought an umbrella, I got soaked in the rain.
I don't go hiking at night, being afraid of animals.
Being sleepy, I went to bed early.
> 정답: Looking out the window, I saw a rainbow appear.

---

**08.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
As soon as she heard the bell ring, Amy rushed to the door.
Heard the bell ring, Amy rushed to the door.
Hearing the bell ring, Amy rushed to the door.
To hear the bell ring, Amy rushed to the door.
She heard the bell ring, Amy rushed to the door.
> 정답: Hearing the bell ring, Amy rushed to the door.

---

**09.** 주어진 분사구문을 부사절로 바꿀 때 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
Napping in a library, she couldn't finish the report. → Because she naps in a library, she couldn't finish the report.
> 정답: Because, she, napped

---

**10.** 주어진 문장을 분사구문으로 바꿀 때 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
When I entered the bookstore, I noticed that I had left my wallet. → I entering the bookstore, I noticed that I had left my wallet.
> 정답: Entering, I, noticed

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분의 분사 구문과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
Arriving at the cafe, she ordered tea.
Taking a bus, you arrived on time.
Studying hard, he passed the exam he wanted.
Seeing him at the station, I waved at him.
Hardly knowing Spanish, she couldn't talk to the tourist.
> 정답: Seeing him at the station, I waved at him.

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분의 분사 구문과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
Being too young, he can't go there alone.
Waiting for the taxi, she was reading a magazine.
Opening the drawer, I found a letter inside it.
Saying goodbye at the café, I went back home.
Not wanting to play outside, I refused her invitation.
> 정답: Not wanting to play outside, I refused her invitation.

---

**13.** 다음 두 분사구문이 공통으로 의미하는 접속사를 고르시오.
Arriving at the bus stop, she met her old friend.
Leaving the house, he grabbed his keys.
Because If When Although
> 정답: When

---

**14.** 다음 두 분사구문이 공통으로 의미하는 접속사를 고르시오.
Being smart, she must solve the problem.
Being moved by the story, I cried.
As soon as After Before Because
> 정답: Because

---

**15.** 다음 두 분사구문이 공통으로 의미하는 접속사를 고르시오.
Waking up in the morning, I drank warm water.
Finishing her homework, she watched TV.
If After Before Though
> 정답: After

---

**16.** 다음 주어진 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
Entering the theater, she turned off her phone.
When she entered the theater.
Although she enter the theater.
If she entered the theater.
And she entered the theater.
> 정답: When she entered the theater.

---

**17.** 다음 중 분사구문이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Turning to the left, you will find the library.
Wearing a thin jacket, she felt cold.
Being hungry, she ate a sandwich.
She crossing the road, the girl raised her hand.
> 정답: She crossing the road, the girl raised her hand.

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 옮길 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오. [2개]
공원을 걸을 때, 나는 새들이 노래하는 것을 들었다. __________________ in the park, I heard birds singing.
As I walked Because I was walking Walking Since I was walking
> 정답: As I walked, Walking

---
